payload.long_description: Partial lower-front view of a dark-stained wooden cabinet with two raised rectangular panel doors and a central seam; warm brown glossy finish with visible vertical wood grain, scuffs and small chips along the bottom toe-kick, and the image is edge-cropped — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
